title: Being able to add images to automation emails (on the body or as files)

posts.author: axelestrada123 (Axel Estrada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Being able to add images to the body of an email being sent out via automation. Being able to grab an image from the board and implement it to the body of the email or as a file.

What are you trying to achieve

To get this request implemented hopefully soon, to better communicate with my team using different images/files.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @axelestrada123
You can do that with Supermail app, this is exactly what it is designed to do.
You can try it out for free.
